texto: Through all the challenges life may throw at us
autor: let’s not forget that we are soul mates… companions… individuals… divinely fused together by the immeasurable power of love… and that we can get through it all… as one.
explicacao: Citação de let’s not forget that we are soul mates… companions… individuals… divinely fused together by the immeasurable power of love… and that we can get through it all… as one. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Through all the challenges life may throw at us” articula reflexao, steve-maraboli, through em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
